test-method.name: verifyTheUserIsAbleToAddNews
test-method.description: validating wheather the user is able to access and add news in managenews page

test-method.name: verifyTheUserIsAbleToLogout
test-method.description: validating wheather the user is able to logout and directed to loginpage

test-method.name: verifyTheUserIsAbleToLoginWithInValidPasswordAndInValidUsername
test-method.description: validating wheather the user is not able to login and not directed to homepage using invalid credentials

test-method.name: verifyTheUserIsAbleToLoginWithInValidPasswordAndValidUsername
test-method.description: validating wheather the user is not able to login and not directed to homepage using invalid password

test-method.name: verifyTheUserIsAbleToLoginWithValidCredentials
test-method.description: validating wheather the user is able to login and directed to homepage using valid credentials

test-method.name: verifyTheUserIsAbleToLoginWithValidPasswordAndInValidUsername
test-method.description: validating wheather the user is not able to login and not directed to homepage using invalid username

test-method.name: verifyTheUserIsAbleToUpadteManageContact
test-method.description: validating wheather the user is able to update the details of managecontact page
